title: Final SEO QA Pass
purpose: Final quality assurance checklist for SEO, structured data, social sharing, multilingual readiness, performance, search-console readiness, and post-deployment validation.

qaCategories.label: Crawlability
checks: robots.txt exists at the site root
sitemap.xml exists at the site root
sitemap.xml includes the homepage and Phase D platform pages
important pages are not blocked by robots directives

qaCategories.label: Core metadata
checks: Every public page has a unique title
Every public page has a meta description
Canonical URLs use https://ucaism.org/
Author and theme-color metadata are consistent

qaCategories.label: Schema.org structured data
checks: Organization or ResearchOrganization schema is valid
Person schema for Chang-Gyu Kwag is present where appropriate
Book schema for Open Wins is available
CollectionPage/WebPage schema is available for research-platform pages

qaCategories.label: Open Graph and Twitter Cards
checks: og:title and og:description are present
og:image points to a valid public image
twitter:card uses summary_large_image
Social previews are consistent across main platform pages

qaCategories.label: Multilingual readiness
checks: Language foundation pages exist for ko, ja, and es
hreflang snippets are prepared
Translation style notes are documented
Language switcher can be added without breaking the main navigation

qaCategories.label: Performance
checks: Images use reasonable file sizes and dimensions
Scripts that do not need to block rendering use defer
CSS additions remain additive and do not break existing pages
Lighthouse checks are ready for post-deployment review

qaCategories.label: Search and analytics readiness
checks: Search Console setup guide is present
Analytics snippets are documented but not forced into production
Privacy-friendly analytics policy is documented
Verification metadata can be updated when real verification codes are issued

recommendedPostDeploymentChecks: Open the Phase D public pages after each push
Run Google Rich Results Test on representative pages
Run Facebook Sharing Debugger or LinkedIn Post Inspector for social previews
Run Lighthouse on the homepage and at least three Phase D pages
Submit sitemap.xml in Google Search Console after ownership verification
